subcodes.first_line: The Manifestations have been cut off [culminated] in this Most Great Manifestation, the hidden Symbol, the Ancient Light, and the Lord of Nations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انقطعت الظهورات الی الظهور الاعظم و الرمز المنمنم و نور القدم و مالک الامم
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @light and darkness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
